medical_history.history_of_present_illness: Mr. ___ is a ___ year old man found to have a right sphenoid wing meningioma after he experienced a first-time seizure. The seizure occurred in early ___ of this year and presented as confusion with repetitive questions. The patient was referred by neuro-oncology to neurosurgery for evaluation and treatment of his presumed meningioma.
medical_history.past_medical_history: 1. Right sphenoid wing meningioma 2. Seizure 3. Hypertension 4. Dyslipidemia 5. Kidney stones 6. Inguinal hernia repair ___

physical_examination.general_examination: Upon discharge: Awake, alert, oriented x 3. Follows commands briskly. Speech fluent. PERRL, EOM-I. Mild right periorbital edema. Face symmetric, TM. MAE ___ strength. Sensation grossly intact to LT. Wound c/d/i, closed with sutures.
